content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad gap-up across pharma, FMCG, defense, financials and metals on global risk-on cues (US indices +1.5-2%, crude collapsed to ~$103, INR recovering). Existing book is sitting on substantial unrealized gains as nearly every holding gapped up materially. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners — not adding new exposure into an already-extended tape with the experiment cumulative P&L deeply negative (-53.72%).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Trail SL from 1030 to 1035 (above entry breakeven, ~2.05% below CMP — preserves trail-gap discipline >1%). Q4 strong, sub-1% GNPA milestone, target 1110 still ~5% upside. R:R intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.78%. SL 121 still ~2.5% below CMP. Defensive position, MACD bearish crossover but tracking gold — no trail/exit warranted at small loss; let SL or thesis play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4% gain, ATH territory. Trail SL from 1720 to 1730 (above entry, ~1.55% below CMP — respects trail-gap floor). Q4 strong (PAT +9%, revenue +26%); target 1820 unchanged. Locks in ~1.8% minimum gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Trail SL from 4530 to 4575 (breakeven, 1.2% below CMP — meets trail-gap floor). Strong order book Rs 2.54 trn, defense tailwinds intact despite mild de-escalation noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.16%. Trail SL from 6900 to 6960 (above entry breakeven, 1.26% below CMP). Q4 EBITDA +80%, margin +875bps, near ATH. R:R intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86%, gap-up +9.84% from prior close. Trail SL from 820 to 830 (still 1.8% below CMP). Pre-Q4 binary risk — SL tightened to cap event tail. If results disappoint, exit at 830 with minimal loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08%, but at 52-week high. Q4 results strong (ROA +63bps, VNB +260bps). Trail SL from 358 to 363 (1.55% below CMP, still above floor). Locks in tighter risk on a name that's already at resistance."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 810.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.31%. Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22%, ATH. Trail SL from 805 to 810 (1.5% below CMP, respects floor). Bullish FMCG turnaround, MOFSL target Rs 950."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. 10% upper-circuit move on Q4 PAT +124% (one-time tax reversal noted). Trail SL from 1245 to 1259 (breakeven, 1.57% below CMP). Bucks weak IT sector trend; let target 1330 play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%, gap-up +9.2%. Q4 PAT +24%, EBITDA +61%. Trail SL from 2960 to 2990 (1.45% below CMP — within trail-gap floor). Defense PSU shipbuilder rallying, but stock is +49% in April so locking in tighter is prudent."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%, gap-up +10.46% on Q4 record results (revenue +11%, EBITDA margin 46.5%). Trail SL from 788 to 795 (1.52% below CMP, respects floor). Locks in tighter risk on the 10% gap move."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY 600x @ 133.50 from prior session is stale (1739 minutes old) and CMP is 139.04 — well above limit. Order will not fill at 133.50 in current up-tape. Do NOT stack a second order. The pending order should be CANCELLED by the system as stale, but I'm not stacking duplicates per ORDER HYGIENE rule."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in breakeven+ on +7.4% winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, small drawdown, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gain on ATH breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven on defense rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above entry on chemicals rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten ahead of pending Q4 results — event-trade discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten at 52-week high post strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 810.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten on Q4 beat and ATH."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "reasoning": "Move to breakeven on 10% upper-circuit Q4 move; one-time tax reversal warrants caution."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gain on extended defense rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten on 10.46% gap-up Q4 move."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN/AUROPHARMA/BIOCON/DABUR/BHARATFORG all reporting today — binary event, no new entries per discipline rules. HFCL has stale pending order; will not chase at 139 vs 133.50 limit. NEULANDLAB has May 12 binary — wait. VEDL/HINDPETRO/SRF/M&M/GABRIEL all gap-up — do not chase extended momentum on a broad gap-up day; existing book already captures the rally.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed with 11 CNC holdings, all gapped up today on broad risk-on. Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% — the priority is preserving today's gains, not adding more correlated long exposure into an extended tape. All trail SLs respect the >=1% gap-from-CMP rule to avoid self-stopouts. No new entries today: cluster discipline (multiple Defense/Capital Goods names already held: HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH), binary-event density (70+ earnings today), and the gap-up itself argue for risk management mode, not accumulation."
}
